dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.directStripeDesc: Your Stripe account is connected with a dedicated secret key. Use the Customer Data and Payment Links tabs to manage your Stripe data.
dashboard.connectStripeDesc: To start accepting payments, you need to complete Stripe onboarding. This connects your bank account so you can receive payouts.
dashboard.stripeConnectedDesc: Your account is set up and ready to accept payments.

dashboardAnalytics.title: Dashboard
dashboardAnalytics.noData: No data available for this season.
dashboardAnalytics.stripeBanner: Stripe account is not connected. Connect it in your Profile to accept card payments.

profile.title: Club Profile
profile.logoHint: PNG, JPG, GIF, or SVG. Max 2MB.
profile.passStripeFeeHint: When enabled, a processing fee (2.9% + $0.30) will be added to the customer's total at checkout.
profile.logoVisibility: Logo will appear in emails and payment pages
profile.previewTitle: Preview — How parents will see it
profile.languageHint: Choose the default language for your club. This affects the dashboard and all public-facing pages.
profile.emailSettingsHint: Configure SMTP credentials to send emails from your own address (e.g. Gmail). Leave empty to use EasyCoach default.
profile.smtpPasswordHint: For Gmail, use an App Password (not your login password).
profile.gmailHintBody: Gmail requires an App Password when 2-Step Verification is enabled. Go to your Google Account → Security → App Passwords, generate a new password, and paste it above.
profile.supportEmailHint: Email address to receive parent requests and change requests from registration pages.

activities.title: Activities
activities.noActivitiesDesc: Create your first activity to start managing registrations.
activities.deleteConfirm: Delete this activity? This cannot be undone.

teams.title: Teams
teams.noTeamsDesc: Create teams manually or upload an Excel file.
teams.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this team?
teams.importSuccess: {count, plural, one {# team imported successfully!} other {# teams imported successfully!}}
teams.lastImportUndoHint: You can remove all {count} teams from that upload if it was a mistake.
teams.lastImportUndoConfirm: Delete {count} teams from the last Excel upload? Teams already linked to players, orders, or activities will be skipped.
teams.lastImportUndoSkipped: {count} team(s) were skipped because they are in use.
teams.bulkSelectedCount: {count, plural, one {# team selected} other {# teams selected}}
teams.bulkDeleteSelectedConfirm: Delete {count} selected teams? Teams already linked to players, orders, or activities will be skipped.

parents.title: Parents
parents.noParentsDesc: Parents will appear here when created via CSV import or added manually.
parents.noPlayersLinked: No players linked to this parent.
parents.linkPlayersHint: Link players from the Players tab.
parents.deleteConfirm: Delete this parent? Their link to players will be removed.

players.title: Players
players.noPlayersDesc: Upload a CSV or add players manually.
players.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or school...
players.noSubTeam: No subscription team for this season.
players.csvUploadSuccess: Created {playersCreated} players, {parentsCreated} parents, {teamsCreated} teams. Updated {playersUpdated} players, {parentsUpdated} parents.
players.rangersUploadSuccess: Created {playersCreated} players, {parentsCreated} parents, {ordersCreated} registrations. Updated {playersUpdated} players, {parentsUpdated} parents.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.noTransactionsDesc: Complete a payment to see it here

paymentLinks.title: Payment Links
paymentLinks.buttonTextRecurring: Button text is automatically set to "Subscribe" for recurring prices
paymentLinks.savePaymentDetails: Save payment details for future use
paymentLinks.label: Label

register.verifyEmail: Verify your email to continue with registration.
register.verifyingFinalizingDesc: Email verified. Saving your waivers and preparing the next step…
register.waiversDesc: Please review and agree to the following before continuing.
register.waiverMiddle: , have read and agree to the
register.waiversAgree: I, {name}, have read and agree to the {title}.
register.alreadyRegisteredDesc: You have already completed registration and payment for this activity. If you need to make changes, please send us a request below.
register.sendRequestDesc: Let us know what changes you'd like to make and we'll get back to you.
register.requestMessagePlaceholder: Describe the changes you'd like to make...
register.requestSentDesc: We received your request and will get back to you soon.
register.paymentAlreadyMadeDesc: Your payment has been processed. Please complete the registration steps above. If you need to make changes to your payment, send us a request below.
register.parent1FillsHint: This is the parent filling out the registration.
register.verifyWaiverEmailDescSuffix: Enter it below to finalize your waivers and continue to payment.
register.verifyCodeInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
register.verifyCodeResent: A new code has been sent.

payment.alreadyPaidDesc: This invoice has already been paid in full. No further action is needed.
payment.partialPaidNotice: Part of this invoice has already been paid.
payment.partialPaidContactOffice: If you have questions about the remaining balance, please contact the club office.
payment.linkInvalid: This payment link is invalid or has expired.
payment.installmentNote: * If paid after {date}, installments start on the 1st of the next month.
payment.installmentFeeHint: Note: Choosing more than {threshold} installments will include a {percent}% fee.
payment.installmentFeeNotice: A {percent}% installment fee of {fee} has been applied. Total with fee: {total}.
payment.agreeToWaiver: I have read and agree to the {title}.
payment.recurringDesc: By proceeding, you authorize {club} to charge your card {amount} today and {count} additional payment(s) of {installmentAmount} each, for a total of {total}.
payment.installmentsStart: Installments will be charged automatically starting {date}.
payment.agreeRecurring: I agree to the recurring payment schedule above and authorize automatic charges to my card.
payment.agreeRecurringWithFee: I agree to the recurring payment schedule above, including the {percent}% installment fee ({fee}), and authorize automatic charges to my card.
payment.recurringFeeNote: This total includes a {percent}% installment fee of {fee}.
payment.firstPayment: First payment of {amount} charged now. Remaining {count} payment(s) charged automatically.

activityDetail.selectRegisteredPlayers: Select registered players (not expected) for bulk actions
activityDetail.discountItemLabel: This is a discount item (negative amount)
activityDetail.noItemsFoundInSelected: No items found in selected orders.
activityDetail.registeredInvoicesNote: This will apply to {orderCount} registered player invoice(s){skippedNote}
activityDetail.emailMessageHint: This message will appear above the player details and payment button in the email.
activityDetail.unpaidParentsWillReceive: {count} unpaid parent(s) will receive this email
activityDetail.expectedSkipped: ({count} expected players without orders will be skipped)
activityDetail.noEligibleParents: No eligible parents found for the selected teams.
activityDetail.defaultPaymentEmailBody:
Dear parent,

Please complete your payment using the link below.

{personal_payment_link}
activityDetail.defaultRegistrationEmailBody:
Dear parent,

Please complete your registration using the link below.

{personal_registration_link}
activityDetail.personalLinkBoxLine1Payment: Paste the token on its own line and it becomes a clickable "Pay Now" button — each parent receives their own unique link.
activityDetail.personalLinkBoxLine1Registration: Paste the token on its own line and it becomes a clickable "Complete Registration" button — each parent receives their own unique link.
activityDetail.personalLinkBoxLine2: Prefer custom wording? Create a link or button with the toolbar and use this token as the URL — it will be swapped out with each parent's personal link automatically.
activityDetail.defaultPaymentSmsBody: Please complete your payment for {activity}. Link: {link}
activityDetail.defaultRegistrationSmsBody: Please complete your registration for {activity}. Link: {link}
activityDetail.bulkMessageNoContacts: No reachable recipients for the selected target
activityDetail.bulkMessageTemplateInvitationHint: Loaded from the activity's Registration Invitation Template. You can still edit it before sending.
activityDetail.waiversHint: Add documents that require parent/guardian consent before registration
activityDetail.descriptionHint: Supports basic formatting — bold, italic, lists.
activityDetail.noTeamsAvailable: No teams available for this season.
activityDetail.addTeamsButton: Add {count, plural, one {# Team} other {# Teams}}
activityDetail.label: Label
activityDetail.dueDateAmountHint: Upfront amount at registration (counts as installment #1)
activityDetail.dueDateAmountInvoiceHint: Only affects the first ("due now") payment when the parent picks an installment plan — it does not change Pay-in-Full or the total. Defaults to subscription ({amount}). Clear the field or re-enter the default to remove the override.
activityDetail.firstInstallmentDateHint: * If a parent pays after this date, installments start on the 1st of next month
activityDetail.feeThresholdHint: Fee applies when choosing more than this many installments (0 = disabled)
activityDetail.addTeamsFirst: Add teams in the Teams tab first.
activityDetail.willNotAppearAfter: Will not appear after this date
activityDetail.paymentTypesHint: Messages below will appear after registration for each payment type.
activityDetail.noWaiversDesc: Upload a .docx file or add a waiver manually.
activityDetail.contentHint: Rich text — bold, italic, lists supported. You can also paste content from Word.
activityDetail.requiredWaiver: Required — parent must agree before proceeding
activityDetail.requireWaiverEmailConfirmation: Require email confirmation after signing waivers
activityDetail.requireWaiverEmailConfirmationHint: After agreeing to the waivers, the parent must verify their email with a one-time code before continuing to payment. If off, the signed-waiver PDF is emailed after payment succeeds instead.
activityDetail.afterRegistrationDesc: This message will be shown to the user after they complete registration.
activityDetail.registrationInvitationDesc: This template pre-fills the email and SMS when you send registration links in bulk. You can still tweak it for each send.
activityDetail.registrationInvitationDefaultBody:
Hi there,

We'd love to welcome {player_name} to {club_name} for the upcoming {activity_name} with the {team_name} squad.

Tap the button below to complete the registration — your link is private and belongs to this player only.

Register here

See you on the field!
activityDetail.templateVariablesHint: Use variables like {player_name}, {activity_name}, {team_name}, {club_name} — they'll be filled in for each recipient.
activityDetail.templatePreviewHint: This is the Registration Invitation Template for this activity. Edits here only affect this send.
activityDetail.title: Title
activityDetail.passStripeFeeHint: When enabled, a processing fee (2.9% + $0.30) will be added to the customer's total at checkout.
activityDetail.searchParentPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone...
activityDetail.parentEditConfirm: How would you like to save?
activityDetail.replaceWithNewParent: Remove from this parent & create new one
activityDetail.selectRecipientsAndChannels: Select who to send to and how:
activityDetail.respondDesc: Select recipients and respond via email or SMS.

paymentRequest.reasonRequired: Please provide a reason for this change
paymentRequest.savedAndStripeCancelled: Saved — Stripe subscription cancelled (no remaining installments)
paymentRequest.savedButStripeFailed: Saved locally but Stripe sync failed: {error}
paymentRequest.installmentsExceedTotal: Installments total exceeds the invoice amount — please adjust before saving.
paymentRequest.installmentsHint: Uncheck options you don't want to offer
paymentRequest.alreadyPaidDesc: This payment request has already been paid. Thank you!
paymentRequest.manualItemsKept: Other items on the invoice will be kept as-is.
paymentRequest.teamChangeSubscription: The new team belongs to a different subscription. Review the changes below.
paymentRequest.discountWillBeCleared: An existing order-level discount of {amount} will be cleared.

email.verifyDesc: Use the code below to complete your registration. This code expires in 10 minutes.
email.verifyIgnore: If you didn't request this code, you can safely ignore this email.
email.regLinkDesc: {club} has invited you to complete registration for {player}.
email.regLinkIgnore: If you didn't expect this email, you can safely ignore it.
email.invoiceDesc: Thank you for completing registration for {player}.
email.invoiceReceipt: This is your receipt. Keep it for your records.
email.inviteDesc: Hi {parent}, {club} has invited you to manage your child's registrations.
email.inviteIgnore: If you didn't expect this email, you can safely ignore it.
email.paymentIgnore: If you didn't expect this email, you can safely ignore it.
email.staffInviteDesc: Hi {staff}, {club} has invited you to join as a staff member.
email.staffInviteChangeHint: You'll be asked to set a new password when you first log in.
email.staffInviteIgnore: If you didn't expect this email, you can safely ignore it.
email.staffResetDesc: Hi {staff}, your password for {club} has been reset.
email.regConfirmDesc: Registration for {player} in {activity} has been completed.
email.regConfirmPdfNote: Please find the registration details and signed waivers attached as a PDF document. Keep this for your records.
email.waiverConfirmDesc: The following waivers have been accepted for {player} in {activity}.
email.waiverConfirmPdfNote: A PDF copy of the signed waivers is attached for your records.

messages.subject: Subject
messages.addRecipientsHint: Select players and parents to receive this message
messages.imgLinkPlaceholder: Paste URL to link this image...
messages.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
messages.emailAlreadyAdded: This email is already in the recipient list
messages.sentFailed: Failed to send email. The message was saved.
messages.sendFailedAuth: Email login failed. If using Gmail, make sure you're using an App Password (not your regular password). Go to Profile → Email Settings to update.
messages.sendFailedConnection: Could not connect to the email server. Please check your SMTP settings in Profile → Email Settings.
messages.failedHint: This email failed to send. You can edit and resend it.
messages.smsNotificationPrefix: You have received an email from us.
messages.phoneAlreadyAdded: This phone number is already in the recipient list

leads.deleteConfirm: Delete this lead and all its submissions?
leads.notifyStaffHint: Selected staff members will be notified each time someone submits this form.
leads.noStaff: No staff members yet. Add users in the Users tab.
leads.staffMissingPhone: No phone number — won't receive SMS
leads.mustFieldLocked: Required field — cannot be removed or hidden
leads.formHint: Build the form questions your visitors will fill out. Email and phone fields are always required.
leads.label: Label
leads.labelHint: Shown above the input on the public form.
leads.noSubmissions: No submissions yet. Share the link to start receiving leads.
